examples.title: Generic Framework Activity Controller
examples.description: Demonstrates how framework activities are executed in sequence
examples.explanation: This pseudocode shows the sequential execution of all five framework activities, with each activity's output being used by the next activity.

examples.title: Planning Activity Algorithm
examples.description: Demonstrates key steps in the Planning framework activity
examples.code:
PROCEDURE PerformPlanning(requirements)
BEGIN
 // Estimate project parameters
 estimatedCost = EstimateCost(requirements)
 estimatedTime = EstimateTime(requirements)
 
 // Define project tasks
 taskList = DefineTasks(requirements)
 
 // Create schedule with milestones
 schedule = CreateSchedule(taskList)
 milestones = DefineMilestones(schedule)
 
 // Identify and manage risks
 risks = IdentifyRisks(requirements)
 riskMitigation = DevelopMitigation(risks)
 
 // Create project plan
 projectPlan = {
 cost: estimatedCost,
 time: estimatedTime,
 tasks: taskList,
 schedule: schedule,
 milestones: milestones,
 risks: riskMitigation
 }
 
 RETURN projectPlan
END
examples.explanation: Shows the key components of the Planning activity: estimation, task definition, scheduling, and risk management.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) - depends on project size and complexity

examples.title: Construction Activity Process
examples.description: Shows the coding and testing components of Construction
examples.code:
PROCEDURE PerformConstruction(designModel)
BEGIN
 // Component 1: Coding
 softwareModules = []
 FOR each module IN designModel.modules
 BEGIN
 code = WriteCode(module)
 ApplyCodingStandards(code)
 AddToRepository(code)
 softwareModules.add(code)
 END
 
 // Component 2: Testing
 testResults = []
 
 // Unit Testing
 FOR each module IN softwareModules
 BEGIN
 unitResult = UnitTest(module)
 testResults.add(unitResult)
 IF unitResult.failed THEN
 Debug(module)
 END
 END
 
 // Integration Testing
 intResult = IntegrationTest(softwareModules)
 testResults.add(intResult)
 
 // System Testing
 sysResult = SystemTest(softwareModules)
 testResults.add(sysResult)
 
 build = {
 modules: softwareModules,
 tests: testResults
 }
 
 RETURN build
END
examples.explanation: Demonstrates that Construction involves both coding (writing modules) and testing (unit, integration, system) in an iterative manner.
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) - stores modules and test results

examples.title: Communication Activity Steps
examples.description: Shows the steps in gathering requirements through communication
examples.code:
PROCEDURE PerformCommunication()
BEGIN
 // Step 1: Establish contact with stakeholders
 stakeholders = IdentifyStakeholders()
 
 // Step 2: Gather requirements through various techniques
 requirements = []
 FOR each technique IN [interviews, surveys, workshops, documents]
 BEGIN
 rawData = CollectUsingTechnique(technique, stakeholders)
 requirements.add(ProcessData(rawData))
 END
 
 // Step 3: Analyze and clarify requirements
 clarifiedRequirements = AnalyzeRequirements(requirements)
 
 // Step 4: Create requirements document
 requirementsDoc = CreateDocument(clarifiedRequirements)
 
 // Step 5: Review with stakeholders
 feedback = ReviewWithStakeholders(requirementsDoc)
 IF feedback.hasChanges THEN
 UpdateRequirements(requirementsDoc, feedback)
 END
 
 RETURN requirementsDoc
END
examples.explanation: Shows that Communication involves multiple techniques to gather requirements and validation through stakeholder review.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) - depends on stakeholder count and techniques
